title: BEM-841 execute 840 route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:16 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
route=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if rs=='next_process_real_claude_response':
    status='process_real_response_selected'
    next_action='parse real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif rs=='next_repair_real_claude_response':
    req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem841_real_claude_response_required.md')
    req.write_text('# BEM-841 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide a REAL response for the multi-agent architecture/protocol agreement. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem841_claude_response.md. The response MUST include exact marker `Claude Internal Auditor` and exact line `Decision: APPROVED` or `Decision: CHANGE_REQUIRED` or `Decision: BLOCKED`. Explain why previous mailbox responses were missing if known. Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 dispatch Claude dispatcher to produce real response with required marker','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(req),str(q)]
    status='real_claude_response_request_and_dispatch_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify dispatch result, runtime state, and real Claude response file'
elif rs=='next_repair_dispatch_results':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_dispatch_result_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 dispatch result probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(q)]
    status='dispatch_result_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif rs=='next_repair_claude_runtime_state':
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 Claude runtime-state proof probe','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files=[str(q)]
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick, then verify runtime state'
else:
    status='unknown_route_no_action'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-840 route state'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'route_status':rs,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_route.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute BEM-840 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_route.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 route by queuing a real Claude response dispatch or the first missing proof repair')
"""
No issue comments.
